generated_oml:
// C1: System Under Study
instance AECOBuildingDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "BIM-centric cyber-physical framework for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations within AECO domain. Leverages TwinLight and BOREALIS projects to address fragmented data landscapes and lack of standardized integration."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensor deployed in buildings, modeled within BIM and integrated via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data ingestion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental humidity sensor deployed in buildings, modeled within BIM and integrated via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data ingestion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor deployed in buildings, modeled within BIM and integrated via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data ingestion. Used for post-occupancy sensor data in BOREALIS project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingIntensitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting intensity sensor deployed in buildings, modeled within BIM and integrated via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data ingestion. Focused on sensor configurations for lighting systems in TwinLight project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingIntensityDataTransmitted
]

instance IoTSensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Network of IoT devices collecting real-time operational data from buildings, modeled within BIM and integrated via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for bidirectional data exchange."
    DTDFVocab:producedData IoTSensorNetworkDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingIntensityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingIntensitySensor
]

instance IoTSensorNetworkDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IoTSensorNetwork
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched BIM model containing device modeling (sensors, actuators, controllers) and metadata annotation (tenant ID, endpoint addresses) for AECO buildings."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Dynamic runtime data including sensor readings (temperature, humidity, occupancy, lighting) ingested via Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightingIntensityDataTransmitted, IoTSensorNetworkDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance SensorMetadataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured metadata extracted from BIM models including tenant ID, device ID, and endpoint addresses for seamless data acquisition."
    DTDFVocab:fromData IoTSensorNetworkDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization model generated for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations using Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT middleware for real-time data ingestion and bidirectional communication between Physical Twin and Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform for device representation, digital twin lifecycle management, and data synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinLifecycleManagementService, BidirectionalControlService
]

instance BIMModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering framework automating model-to-model and model-to-text transformations to generate runtime artifacts from BIM."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService, RuntimeArtifactGenerationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Game engine platform providing rich visualization capabilities for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService, SimulationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning framework for adaptive control policies in BOREALIS project, enabling energy optimization and operational adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, AdaptiveLightingControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time operational analytics including energy consumption trends and occupancy patterns."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight, OccupancyPatternInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating predictive maintenance alerts for equipment failure risks based on real-time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides EquipmentFailureRiskInsight
]

instance DigitalTwinLifecycleManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing the lifecycle of digital twins including creation, updates, and synchronization with physical counterparts."
    DTDFVocab:provides DigitalTwinConsistencyInsight
]

instance BidirectionalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling automated bidirectional communication between Digital Twin and Physical Twin for control signals."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingAdjustmentAction, HVACSetpointAdjustmentAction
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating the commissioning of Building Control Systems via model-driven transformations."
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningStatusInsight
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime artifacts including device configurations and middleware metadata from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeArtifactAvailabilityInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive visualization of building operations through Unreal Engine 5 for facility managers."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling simulation of building operations for predictive analysis and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing energy consumption through reinforcement learning policies for adaptive lighting systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service controlling adaptive lighting systems using reinforcement learning for energy-efficient operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time analytics of energy consumption trends across building systems."
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of occupancy patterns to optimize building operations."
]

instance EquipmentFailureRiskInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive alerts indicating potential equipment failures based on sensor data."
]

instance DigitalTwinConsistencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of semantic consistency and completeness between Physical Twin and Digital Twin representations."
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on real-time data and control policies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACSetpointAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC setpoints for energy optimization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CommissioningStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status and progress of automated commissioning processes for Building Control Systems."
]

instance RuntimeArtifactAvailabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Availability and status of generated runtime artifacts for deployment."
]

instance BuildingStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of current building state and operational parameters."
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from building operation simulations for predictive analysis."
]

instance EnergySavingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative insights into energy savings achieved through optimization policies."
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adaptive control of lighting systems using reinforcement learning for energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuators including lighting control systems, HVAC actuators, and other IoT-enabled devices modeled within BIM and integrated via runtime interfaces."
]

instance LightingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting control system component focused on adaptive lighting configurations as part of TwinLight project."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuator component for environmental control within building infrastructure."
]

// C5: Twinning Process and DT Evolution
instance BIMEnrichmentProcess : DTDFVocab:Process [
    base:desc "First stage of twinning process involving device modeling and metadata annotation within BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:produces BIMEnrichedModel
]

instance ModelValidationProcess : DTDFVocab:Process [
    base:desc "Automated validation stage checking semantic consistency and completeness of BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:produces DigitalTwinConsistencyInsight
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationProcess : DTDFVocab:Process [
    base:desc "Model-to-model/text transformations producing Hono/Ditto configurations and Unreal Engine visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:produces RuntimeArtifactAvailabilityInsight
]

instance DeploymentProcess : DTDFVocab:Process [
    base:desc "Automated setup of bidirectional communication between Physical Twin and Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:produces BidirectionalControlService
]

instance RuntimeEvolutionProcess : DTDFVocab:Process [
    base:desc "Dynamic updates including reinforcement learning policy refinements via runtime configuration management."
    DTDFVocab:produces EnergySavingsInsight
]

// C7: Multiplicities
instance CentralizedDigitalTwinArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Architecture [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture supporting multiple internal twins composed hierarchically or deployed independently."
    base:contains LightingSubsystemTwin, HVACSubsystemTwin, StructuralSubsystemTwin
]

instance LightingSubsystemTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular subsystem twin for lighting control systems with partial synchronization to central DT."
]

instance HVACSubsystemTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular subsystem twin for HVAC systems with partial synchronization to central DT."
]

instance StructuralSubsystemTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular subsystem twin for structural components with partial synchronization to central DT."
]

instance BIMBasedMetamodel : DTDFVocab:Metamodel [
    base:desc "BIM-based metamodel defining semantic relationships between twins including spatial, functional, and operational dependencies."
    DTDFVocab:defines CentralizedDigitalTwinArchitecture
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates **control signals and commands** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) that are transmitted back to the Physical Twin (PT) via **bidirectional communication channels** established through **Eclipse Hono and Ditto**. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing the DT to **dynamically adjust control logic** without full redeployment. For example, the **BOREALIS project** uses **reinforcement learning** to optimize lighting policies based on real-time sensor feedback, while **TwinLight** enables **user-centered control strategies** for lighting systems. These interactions are facilitated by **standardized extension points** in the DT architecture."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on **real-time and near-real-time time scales**, with **continuous synchronization** between the Physical Twin (PT) and Digital Twin (DT) enabled by **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for IoT data exchange. The framework supports:
  - **Real-time data ingestion** (e.g., sensor readings, operational states) for immediate monitoring and control.
  - **Periodic synchronization** (e.g., hourly/daily updates) for **predictive analytics and optimization** (e.g., energy consumption modeling in BOREALIS).
  - **Event-driven updates** (e.g., occupancy changes, fault detection) to maintain **high-fidelity synchronization**.
  The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **degree of synchronization** between PT and DT."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **modular, service-oriented architecture** with:
  - **Central DT Framework**: Core component managing **bidirectional data exchange, synchronization, and service integration**.
  - **Subsystem Twins**: **Modular twins** (e.g., lighting, HVAC) with **standardized extension points** for **plug-and-play service integration**.
  - **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for **real-time data routing** and **device management**.
  - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for **interactive 3D monitoring**.
  - **Extension Points**: **APIs and hooks** for **custom service integration** (e.g., analytics, AI-driven optimization).
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across **heterogeneous building systems** while maintaining **interoperability** via **BIM-based semantic alignment**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **multiple life cycle stages** of the building, from **design and construction to operation and refurbishment**, with representations aligned to:
  - **As-designed (ideal)**: Initial BIM models used as the **semantic backbone** for DT deployment.
  - **As-manufactured**: Post-construction data integration (e.g., **as-built models, sensor calibrations**).
  - **As-operated**: **Real-time operational data** (e.g., sensor readings, control signals) for **predictive maintenance and optimization**.
  The framework enables **continuous evolution** of the DT throughout the building’s life cycle, with **runtime updates** (e.g., **BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning adaptations**) ensuring **long-term synchronization** with the PT."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Quantifies the **degree of synchronization** between PT and DT.
  - **Automated Validation**: Checks for **semantic consistency** between BIM models and runtime data.
  - **Bidirectional Synchronization**: **Real-time data exchange** via **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** minimizes **semantic drift**.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: **Reinforcement learning (BOREALIS)** iteratively refines control policies to **adapt to operational uncertainties**.
  - **Verification and Validation (V&V)**: **Case study evaluations** (e.g., **Living Lab deployment**) assess **accuracy, responsiveness, and interoperability** of the DT."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the Physical Twin (PT) and Digital Twin (DT) is established via:
  - **Eclipse Hono**: **IoT connectivity layer** for **real-time data ingestion** and **device management**, supporting **MQTT/AMQP protocols**.
  - **Eclipse Ditto**: **Digital twin management** for **device representation, twin lifecycle management, and data synchronization**.
  - **Bidirectional APIs**: **RESTful or message-based interfaces** for **control signal transmission** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC commands).
  - **Network Protocols**: **Standardized IoT protocols** (e.g., **MQTT, CoAP**) for **low-latency communication** between sensors/actuators and the DT."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed using:
  - **Cloud/Edge Hybrid Architecture**: Supports **scalable deployment** of **subsystem twins** (e.g., lighting, HVAC) with **modular scalability**.
  - **Containerization**: **Docker/Kubernetes** for **isolated service deployment** and **runtime updates**.
  - **Unreal Engine 5**: **Client-side visualization** for **interactive monitoring**, deployed as a **standalone application or web-based interface**.
  - **Automated Deployment Pipelines**: **CI/CD workflows** for **reproducible DT setups** and **version-controlled configurations**."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT framework supports **horizontal integration** with:
  - **External IoT Platforms**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** enable **interoperability** with **third-party sensor networks** and **legacy BCS**.
  - **Enterprise Systems**: **BIM-based data schemas** allow integration with **ERP, CMMS, or facility management systems**.
  - **Other Digital Twins**: **Standardized extension points** facilitate **federated DT ecosystems** (e.g., **city-scale infrastructure twins**).
  The framework uses **open standards** (e.g., **OPC UA, MQTT**) to ensure **cross-platform compatibility**."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are addressed through:
  - **BIM-Based Access Control**: **Role-based permissions** (e.g., **Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers**) aligned with **AECO stakeholder roles**.
  - **GDPR/Compliance Alignment**: **Anonymization and encryption** of **occupant-related sensor data** (e.g., occupancy patterns).
  - **Decentralized Data Storage**: **Edge computing** for **localized data processing** to minimize **cloud-based exposure**.
  - **Audit Logs**: **Tracking data provenance** for **transparency and compliance** in **shared DT environments**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to:
  - **BIM Standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** and **COBie** for **semantic interoperability**.
  - **IoT Standards**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** comply with **OPC UA, MQTT, and AMQP** for **device connectivity**.
  - **Digital Twin Standards**: **Ditto’s Digital Twin Model** and **model-driven transformations** align with **ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Framework)**.
  - **AECO-Specific Standards**: **TwinLight and BOREALIS** integrate **lighting control and energy optimization** standards (e.g., **LEED, EN 12464-1**)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are ensured through:
  - **Authentication and Authorization**: **Role-based access control (RBAC)** for **stakeholder-specific permissions**.
  - **Data Encryption**: **TLS/SSL** for **secure communication** between PT and DT.
  - **Fault Tolerance**: **Redundant middleware layers** (e.g., **Hono/Ditto failover mechanisms**) to prevent **system outages**.
  - **Safety Protocols**: **Remote operation safeguards** (e.g., **manual override capabilities** for critical systems like HVAC).
  - **Compliance with AECO Safety Standards**: **ISO 55000 (Asset Management)** and **IEC 62443 (Industrial Cybersecurity)** for **secure DT operations**."
]
